_source: duplicated from data/processed/elo_current_ratings.csv — NOTE: this file is confirmed frozen at pre-tournament values, does not reflect real WC2026 in-tournament results (same documented staleness bug as every prior match folder, see project memory / feedback_qnumber_join_safety sibling notes on frozen Elo).

corrected_point_in_time_ratings._source: data/processed/wc2026_pit_elo_panel.csv, built by ml/backtests/build_full_tournament_pit_elo.py — a systematic point-in-time replay of ALL 100 WC2026 matches for ALL 48 teams (every opponent's rating is itself genuinely point-in-time, not frozen). This is the project's canonical PIT Elo source per REPO_MAP.md Section 6, so no per-matchup hand-built replay script (of the fra_esp_sf_point_in_time_elo_replay.py / nor_eng_qf_point_in_time_elo_replay.py kind) was needed or built for this match — this file is a direct lookup of each team's elo_post value from their most recent played WC2026 match, not a new computation.

England.path: Group: 4-2 Croatia (H), 0-0 Ghana (H), 2-0 Panama (A); R32: 2-1 DR Congo (H); R16: 3-2 Mexico (A); QF: 2-1 Norway (A)

Argentina.path: Group: 3-0 Algeria (H), 2-0 Austria (H), 3-1 Jordan (A); R32: 3-2 Cape Verde (H, AET); R16: 3-2 Egypt (H); QF: 3-1 Switzerland (H)

diff_argentina_minus_england.shift: -18.12 — stale ratings modestly overstate Argentina's edge; both teams have gained ground in-tournament (England +81.91, Argentina +63.79) relative to their frozen pre-tournament values, but England has gained more, narrowing the gap.

note_on_neutrality: All England and Argentina WC2026 matches to date have been played in the USA on neutral ground per the project's established convention (neutral=True unless USA/Mexico/Canada is itself a participant) — see data/processed/wc2026_pit_elo_panel.csv true_home_advantage column, False for every England/Argentina row. Home/away in the path descriptions above refers to the nominal home/away designation used by ESPN's event feed, not a true home-advantage flag.
